sme_leads.notes: AfroFusion cafe and bar with a strong following on Facebook and Instagram but zero standalone website — prime opportunity for a modern, bookings-enabled site.
Relies solely on a third-party Setmore booking page with no branded website, making it invisible on Google and weak for local SEO.
Facebook-only presence for a busy traditional Turkish barber — no website means no Google visibility and no way to take online bookings.
Listed only on Fresha and Facebook with no dedicated website, meaning it's invisible to anyone Googling nail salons in Shirley.
Turkish barber with a Yell directory listing and no standalone website — highly searchable niche in a busy residential area with no digital home base.

linkedin_prospects.name: Kevin Ashley
linkedin_prospects.title: Branch Partner
linkedin_prospects.reason: 19-year estate agency veteran who ran his own franchise and served as Area Sales Director at Enfields — now leading the Southampton office sales team at a growing independent agency, ideal fit for CloseCoach.

linkedin_prospects.name: Simon Norley
linkedin_prospects.title: Senior Branch Manager
linkedin_prospects.reason: Senior estate agent branch manager with 20+ years experience overseeing a sales team at one of the UK's largest agency groups — exactly the profile CloseCoach targets.

linkedin_prospects.name: Richard Bennett
linkedin_prospects.title: Department Manager
linkedin_prospects.reason: Department Manager at Matchtech, a specialist STEM recruitment agency, managing consultants with revenue targets — CloseCoach's role-play and objection-handling tools fit directly into recruitment sales training.

dts.title: 22 weeks to get your driving test? Here's the legal hack
dts.hook: Open with the NAO stat: average UK wait is 22 weeks and won't hit 7 weeks until 2027 — then pitch DTS as the fastest legal route to an earlier slot.

dts.title: Why DVSA can't fix the test backlog (and what you can do today)
dts.hook: Break down the three causes — COVID backlog, bot-bought slots, examiner shortages — then position DTS swaps as the only thing learners can actually control.

athletics.title: 5am sprint session — acceleration drills I do every week
athletics.hook: Raw, unfiltered track clip of block starts and drive-phase drills, ending with a single tip on arm mechanics to boost first-10m speed.

athletics.title: 30-day calisthenics check-in: what actually changed
athletics.hook: Side-by-side of a key skill (e.g. muscle-up reps or L-sit hold) at day 1 vs day 30, narrated with the one cue that unlocked the improvement.

aimybiz.title: I fed a real sales call transcript into CloseCoach. The feedback was brutal.
aimybiz.hook: Share 3 anonymised AI coaching notes from a roleplay session — specific line-by-line feedback — then invite sales managers to try a free session.

aimybiz.title: Watch CloseCoach coach a rep through the price objection in real time
aimybiz.hook: Screen-record a live CloseCoach roleplay where the AI flags a weak response and suggests a stronger close — aimed at heads of sales who train reps manually today.
